description: No standalone example showing a concrete agent invocation with filled input parameters and resulting output; only abstract JSON schema and test skeleton templates are provided

description: recipe-fullstack-implement routes *-frontend-task-* files to task-executor-frontend and quality-fixer-frontend from dev-workflows-frontend plugin, but the dev-workflows plugin manifest does not declare dev-workflows-frontend as a peer dependency. Users installing only dev-workflows will encounter missing-agent errors.
suggested_fix: Add peerDependencies or requiredPlugins entry in marketplace.json dev-workflows plugin object referencing dev-workflows-frontend, or add a Prerequisites section to the skill body

description: recipe-fullstack-build routes frontend tasks to dev-workflows-frontend agents without the dev-workflows manifest documenting this dependency
suggested_fix: Same fix as recipe-fullstack-implement: document peer plugin dependency in marketplace.json
